name: kyoryokutai-backend
description: Backend for 協力隊クリアベース (regional revitalization team portal)

scripts.start:prod: echo 'WAIT FOR DB' && npx tsx scripts/wait-for-db.ts && echo 'RUN MIGRATE' && npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && if [ "$RUN_SEED" = "true" ]; then echo '=== RUN SEED ===' && npm run seed && echo 'SEED DONE'; fi && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:push: echo 'FIX DB SCHEMA' && npx tsx scripts/fix-prod-db.ts && echo 'DB FIX DONE' && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:baseline: echo 'BASELINE MIGRATE' && npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260403000000_add_government_attendance 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260403000001_gov_attendance_add_time_enddate 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260404000000_announcement_confirm_target 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate resolve --applied 20260405000000_schedule_custom_color 2>/dev/null; npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:recover-p3009: echo 'RUN MIGRATE (recover: resolve failed email migration, then deploy)' && npx prisma migrate resolve --rolled-back 20260329000000_update_member_emails && npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && if [ "$RUN_SEED" = "true" ]; then echo '=== RUN SEED ===' && npm run seed && echo 'SEED DONE'; fi && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod:with-resolve: echo 'WAIT FOR DB' && npx tsx scripts/wait-for-db.ts && echo 'RESOLVE MIGRATIONS' && npx tsx scripts/resolve-migrations.ts && echo 'DEPLOY NEW MIGRATION' && npx prisma migrate deploy && echo 'MIGRATE DONE' && node dist/index.js
